rulings.Case Title: SEAN ILUMIN ET AL VS. RUSSEL G. LEACH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 6, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT PATRICK SULLIVAN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT continued to January 16, 2020 to be heard with other pending motions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SEAN ILUMIN ET AL VS. RUSSEL G. LEACH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Dec. 6, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT PATRICK SULLIVAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 16, 2020. By no later than January 2, 2020 parties to file supplemental briefs addressing contractual limitations on ability to recover attorney's fees authorized by statutes (separate and apart from any attorney's fees authorized solely by contract). The parties may address cases involving landlord-tenant statutes or any cases involving statutes providing for attorney's (e.g. in the context of employment). Parties may file (not required) responses to supplemental briefs by no later than January 9, 2020. = (501/REQ)
